# Pull Request

## Summary

- What changed?
- Why is this change needed?

## Scope

- [ ] Code behavior changed
- [ ] Tests changed
- [ ] Documentation changed
- [ ] Security posture changed
- [ ] CI/dependency/container workflow changed

## Validation

List the exact commands run and results:

```text
make all
# result:
```

If any command was not run, explain why and classify the risk.

## Security and data handling

- [ ] No secrets, tokens, private keys, internal hostnames, or real sensitive data were added.
- [ ] Examples/tests use fake data only.
- [ ] Logs do not include request bodies, response bodies, auth headers, cookies, or arbitrary headers.
- [ ] New dependencies, permissions, or exposed surfaces are explained, or none were added.

## Documentation

- [ ] README/docs were updated or confirmed not affected.
- [ ] ADR/threat model/security docs were updated if this changed architecture, risk, or controls.
- [ ] Public-facing wording remains clear, honest, and non-inflated.

## Residual risks and follow-up

- Residual risks:
- Follow-up items:
